headline: Molotov Maniac Mohamed COPS to Murder Plea 😈🔥💥
text:
Colorado 🔥💣 FIREBOMB FREAK Mohamed Sabry Soliman 🕌😡 just PLEADED GUILTY 😩🙏 to FIRST-DEGREE MURDER 🍆⚰️, staring down LIFE IN THE SLAMMER 🔒⛓️ for YEETING Molotov cocktails 🥛🔥 at pro-Israel hostage squad last June! This Egyptian visa-overstayer 🇺🇸🚫🕌 rolled from Colorado Springs to Boulder like a jihad joyride 🚗💨, plotting for a WHOLE YEAR 🗓️😈 watching EXPLOSIVE TUTORIALS 📱💥 before SLINGING FIREBOMBS at 'Run For Their Lives' crew 🏃‍♂️🇮🇱 chanting for Hamas-held hostages from Oct 7 HORROR 🎃🍆! Screamed 'FREE PALESTINE' 🆓🇵🇸 while HURLING death bottles, injuring 12 peeps 😵‍💫🚑 and straight-up MURDERING 82yo granny Karen Diamond 👵💔 who later KEELD from burns! Cops found 14 EXTRA unlit boom-bottles 🥛🚫 in his ride 😱📦 – TALK ABOUT OVERPREPARED TERROR THOT! 🧠🤯

Fed HATE CRIME charges incoming 🚨🇺🇸 too, but dude PLEADED NOT GUILTY 🤷‍♂️ there – meanwhile STATE MURDER SLAM is LOCKED 🔒! Told pigs post-bust 'Wanna KILL ALL ZIONISTS' 😡🩸 after Googling 'Zionist events' 🔍🇮🇱 for his 'REVENGE' RAMPAGE 💣🍑! This after DC Jewish center SHOOTING 🔫🕍 and arson at PA gov Josh Shapiro's pad 🔥🏠 – ANTISEMITISM WAVE CRASHING HARD 📈😢 in Biden's backyard! Soliman's squad shocked AF 🤯👨‍👩‍👧‍👦, calling it 'PROFOUNDLY INCONSISTENT' with his chill vibes pre-jihad glow-up 😇➡️😈!

Boulder DA Michael Dougherty 📜🔥 read Diamond fam's savage TEA ☕💅: 'NEVER let this attacker see HIS fam again since he ROBBED US of MOMMY forever!' 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦🚫😭 – no fam show-up, but the SHADE was THICC 🍑! Dude faced charges via INTERPRETER 🗣️🇪🇬, nodding guilty like 'YEP, my bad' 🙈. 12 MORE FED COUNTS 🧑‍⚖️📜 for HATE + FIRE FELONIES – this Molotov Mohamed's FINISHED 🍆⚰️, no Palestine parade for him, just supermax SIMPING eternal! 😂🔒💥 Wall Street Journal who? This is REAL DRAMA hotter than NVDA bubble! 📉➡️🔥
